description: The Ray Rectangle Intersection node determines the first point at which a ray defined by an origin and direction intersects the bounds of the provided Rect.

fields.Intersection: The first point at which the defined ray intersects with the bounds of ``Rectangle``. If the ray does not intersect, the value will be ``[0; 0]``.
fields.Intersects: ``True`` if the ray intersects with ``Rectangle``, ``False`` otherwise.
